mapper.select: select t1.id, t1.version_num_min, t1.version_num_max, t1.version_name, t1.info, t1.href, t1.type from app_version t1 where t1.type=2 order by t1.id desc limit 0,1
select t1.id, t1.version_num_min, t1.version_num_max, t1.version_name, t1.info, t1.href, t1.type from app_version t1 where t1.type=3 order by t1.id desc limit 0,1
